title: Add `podman quadlet ls` as an alias for `podman quadlet list`
body:
### Feature request description

Our other `list` commands provide an `ls` alias for easier typing. I don't see a reason why `podman quadlet list` should be different.

### Suggest potential solution

The `podman quadlet ls` command exists as an alias for `podman quadlet list`

### Have you considered any alternatives?

None

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: You're right, this was fixed with #28097. I'll close this.
